# Welcome to My Quarto Website

This is a simple **Quarto website** demonstrating Quarto capabilities.
## Getting Started

### What is Quarto?

[Quarto](https://quarto.org) is a publishing system for creating scientific and technical content.

- Author with Jupyter notebooks or plain markdown
- Create dynamic content with Python, R, Julia, Observable
- Publish to HTML, PDF, MS Word, ePub
- Build websites, blogs, presentations, and books

### Quick Start

1. **Create a document:**

   ```bash
   quarto create project my-doc --type article
   ```

2. **Render:**

   ```bash
   quarto render
   ```

3. **Open the output:**

   ```bash
   open _quarto-site/index.html
   ```

## Features

This website demonstrates:

- **Navigation** - Navbar with links to pages
- **Styling** - Custom theme (`flatly`)
- **Tables of Contents** - Auto-generated TOC
- **Code Execution** - Code chunks will render

### Code Example

```{python}
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

plt.plot([1, 2, 3], [4, 6, 8], 'r-')
plt.title('Sample Plot')
plt.show()
```

::: {.callout-tip title="Tip"}
You can customize the theme by changing the `theme` option.
:::

## Resources

- [Quarto Docs](https://quarto.org/docs/guide/)
- [Gallery](https://quarto.org/docs/gallery/)
- [Community](https://github.com/quarto-dev/quarto-cli/discussions)

---

Made with [Quarto](https://quarto.org)✨
